raw_description:
The InterContinental Taif is a luxury hotel in the popular resort area of the Hejaz Mountains.  Situated at an elevation of 1700-metres, this 5-star hotel is the perfect spot to enjoy the cooler temperatures, mountain air and picturesque surroundings.

The InterContinental has 179 elegant and comfortable guest rooms.  Each room is beautifully furnished and boasts a range of modern amenities including DVD players and satellite TV.  Many of the rooms overlook the pretty landscaped gardens or King Abdullah’s Palace.

Leisure facilities at the hotel include an indoor swimming pool, tennis court and fitness centre.  There is also a children’s play area.

The popular Hawazen Restaurant is open daily for breakfast, lunch and dinner.  Guests are able to enjoy a truly international range of cuisines here, including Arabic, Chinese, Italian and Asian foods.  It is also possible to dine outside in the pretty gardens.

The InterContinental Taif is well-placed to explore some of the area’s top attractions, including Al Hada Mountain, Shubra Palace and King Fahd Park.  Shoppers are also able to explore the local souqs, selling spices, perfumes and local handicrafts.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it8.9for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at InterContinental Taif by IHG. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 10 key amenities including 2 swimming pools, Free parking, Free WiFi.
